proposal1.heroHeadline: Test is losing 300 hours annually on proposal creation. Here's why it matters.
proposal1.heroSubheadline: Your team spends hours tailoring proposals manually. Our system does it in 47 seconds.
proposal1.problemsIntro: Test is facing ongoing losses that can be halted with a shift in approach.

problems.title: Time Drain
problems.description: Every hour spent crafting a proposal is an hour not spent on closing deals. This inefficiency costs Test potential revenue daily.

problems.title: Inconsistent Branding
problems.description: Manually created proposals often lack uniformity in branding. This inconsistency reduces client trust and can lead to lost opportunities.

problems.title: High Labor Costs
problems.description: Paying skilled professionals to draft proposals is expensive. Each proposal could mean hundreds in labor costs that could be saved.

problems.title: Missed Deadlines
problems.description: Rushing proposals to meet deadlines often results in errors. This jeopardizes Test’s reputation and can lead to lost contracts.

problems.title: Limited Scalability
problems.description: The current process restricts how many proposals Test can produce. This limitation means fewer bids and fewer chances to win new business.

problems.title: Lost Opportunities
problems.description: Delayed responses to RFPs result in missed chances. Each delay means competitors can swoop in and close deals instead.

proposal1.solutionIntro: Our system replaces every inefficiency described above with precision and speed.

solutions.title: Automated Proposal Generation
solutions.description: Currently, proposals are created manually. The system generates them instantly, freeing up valuable time.

solutions.title: Branded Consistency
solutions.description: Branding varies with each manually crafted proposal. Our system ensures every proposal aligns perfectly with Test’s brand.

solutions.title: Cost-Effective
solutions.description: High labor costs impact every proposal. The system reduces these costs by automating the work.

solutions.title: Deadline Assurance
solutions.description: Manual processes risk missed deadlines. Our system guarantees timely delivery by generating proposals in seconds.

solutions.title: Scalable Solutions
solutions.description: Current methods limit proposal output. The system allows unlimited proposals, increasing Test’s opportunity pool.

proposal1.whyUsIntro: Four reasons this works. Not marketing claims. Engineering facts.

whyUsCards.title: Speed
whyUsCards.description: Every hour your team spends writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. This system gives those hours back. Lead data in, live proposal out, 60 seconds.

whyUsCards.title: Personalization
whyUsCards.description: Generic proposals get ignored. Personalized proposals close. The system reads each prospect's website and reflects their services, tone, and positioning back to them. Written from scratch, not templated.

whyUsCards.title: Ownership
whyUsCards.description: No monthly subscription bleeding your budget. No vendor deciding to raise prices or shut down. You own the source code, the infrastructure, and the data. Permanently.

whyUsCards.title: Support
whyUsCards.description: Personal onboarding, a video walkthrough your team can reference anytime, and one week of post-delivery support. You are not left figuring this out alone.

fearCards.title: You are probably thinking: our stack is complicated.
fearCards.sub: CRM, email, Sheets, Slack. The system connects to whatever you already use. No migration.

fearCards.title: You might be wondering if this breaks your current workflow.
fearCards.sub: It runs alongside everything you have. Nothing changes except the time you spend on proposals.

fearCards.title: You are concerned the output will not match your standards.
fearCards.sub: Revisions are part of the build. We configure, test, and refine until the output matches your bar exactly.

proposal1.teamIntro: Your point of contact. No handoffs, no account managers, no layers.

team.name: Ayush Chauhan
team.bio: Full-stack engineer specializing in AI automation for agencies and service businesses. Every engagement personally handled from architecture through deployment. 15+ systems built. Zero failed deliveries. Works async, ships fast.

proposal1.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Kickoff (Async or Call)
process.description: We map your workflow, services, and current proposal process. Can be a 15-minute call or handled entirely over email. By the end, we have everything needed to configure the system.

process.title: System Configuration
process.description: The engine gets configured with your services, pricing structure, tone of voice, and brand standards. Every proposal it generates will sound like your best strategist wrote it.

process.title: Build and QA
process.description: Test proposals generated and reviewed against your quality bar. Refinements continue until the output is indistinguishable from what your team produces manually.

process.title: Deployment and Handoff
process.description: Deployed to production with full infrastructure. You receive a video walkthrough, documentation, and complete source code. From this point, the system runs without us.

proposal1.pricingIntro: Two options. Both are one-time builds. No subscriptions, no recurring fees. You own the source code and infrastructure permanently.

pricing.name: Proposal Engine
pricing.subtitle: // Core System
pricing.description: Custom proposal automation configured for Test's services, voice, and pricing structure.

pricing.name: Engine + AI Chatbot
pricing.subtitle: // Recommended
pricing.description: Everything above, plus an AI sales assistant embedded in every proposal. Handles objections, answers questions, and books calls for Test around the clock.
features: AI chatbot on every proposal page

proposal1.ctaHeadline: See this running on your actual proposals.
proposal1.ctaDescription: Reply here or email Ayush directly. He will send the onboarding form. Takes about 10 minutes and the build starts the same day. Custom-configured for Test.

proposal2.heroHeadline: Unlock Growth Potential with Test's Comprehensive Strategy Services
proposal2.heroSubheadline: We propose a detailed plan to enhance Acme Corp's market position and revenue, focusing on your core business strengths.
proposal2.problemsIntro: Acme Corp is currently experiencing significant revenue losses due to underperformance in key areas.

problems.title: Low Conversion Rates
problems.description: Every visitor who leaves your site without converting is revenue walking out the door. Current conversion rates are 30% below industry benchmarks.

problems.title: Ineffective Marketing
problems.description: Without targeted marketing, potential customers are unaware of your offerings. This results in a 40% lower acquisition rate compared to competitors.

problems.title: Poor Brand Visibility
problems.description: Limited brand awareness is causing potential customers to choose competitors. This is leading to a 25% decrease in market share.

problems.title: Customer Retention Issues
problems.description: Losing existing customers to competitors is reducing your lifetime customer value by 20%.

problems.title: Outdated Digital Strategy
problems.description: An outdated digital approach is causing a 35% reduction in online engagement.

problems.title: Insufficient Data Utilization
problems.description: Not leveraging data analytics is resulting in missed opportunities, leading to a 15% decrease in potential revenue.

proposal2.solutionIntro: Our solutions directly address these problems, aiming to reverse the current losses.

solutions.title: Digital Marketing Strategy
solutions.description: We enhance your marketing efforts, ensuring target audiences are effectively reached and engaged.

solutions.title: Brand Development
solutions.description: We revamp your brand image to increase visibility and market share.

solutions.title: Data Analytics
solutions.description: We utilize data insights to optimize operations and improve decision-making processes.

solutions.title: Website Optimization
solutions.description: We improve your website's user experience to boost conversion rates and reduce bounce rates.

proposal2.whyUsIntro: Test is uniquely positioned to transform Acme Corp's business outcomes.

whyUsCards.title: Proven Expertise
whyUsCards.description: Our team has a track record of successful strategy implementations.

whyUsCards.title: Data-Driven Approach
whyUsCards.description: We prioritize data insights to guide our strategies effectively.

whyUsCards.title: Client-Centric Focus
whyUsCards.description: Our solutions are tailored to meet your specific business needs.

whyUsCards.title: Innovative Solutions
whyUsCards.description: We provide cutting-edge strategies to stay ahead of the competition.

proposal2.teamIntro: Meet the team dedicated to your success.

team.name: there
team.bio: Leading strategy and client relationships, ensuring each project aligns with client goals and delivers measurable results.

proposal2.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Discovery & Analysis
process.description: We begin with an in-depth analysis of your current strategies and market position.

process.title: Strategy Development
process.description: We develop a customized strategy tailored to your business goals.

process.title: Implementation
process.description: Our team implements the strategy, closely monitoring progress.

process.title: Review & Optimization
process.description: We review outcomes and optimize strategies for sustained success.
